<div class="landing" markdown>

<div class="landing-hero" markdown>

# AI Dev Kit

Give your AI coding assistant superpowers on Databricks.
{.tagline}

[Start the Quickstart :material-arrow-right:](quickstart.md){.cta-primary}

</div>

<div class="stats-bar">
  <div class="stat"><span class="num">27</span><span class="label">Skills</span></div>
  <div class="stat"><span class="num">50+</span><span class="label">MCP Tools</span></div>
  <div class="stat"><span class="num">~60 min</span><span class="label">Quickstart</span></div>
</div>

<p class="landing-desc">The <strong>AI Dev Kit</strong> gives AI coding assistants the knowledge and tools to build on Databricks.<br><strong>Skills</strong> teach patterns. <strong>MCP Tools</strong> execute them. You talk, it builds.</p>

| Step | What you build | Time |
|:----:|---------------|-----:|
| **1** | Install the AI Dev Kit | 2 min |
| **2** | Explore and profile your data | 5 min |
| **3** | Generate a sample dataset | 5 min |
| **4** | Build a medallion data pipeline (SDP) | 15 min |
| **5** | Create an AI/BI dashboard | 10 min |
| **6** | Deploy a Knowledge Assistant (RAG agent) | 15 min |
| **7** | Build a full-stack Databricks App | 10 min |

<p class="landing-prereqs"><strong>Prerequisites:</strong> <a href="https://github.com/astral-sh/uv">uv</a>, <a href="https://docs.databricks.com/aws/en/dev-tools/cli/">Databricks CLI</a> (authenticated), and an AI assistant (<a href="https://claude.ai/code">Claude Code</a>, <a href="https://cursor.com">Cursor</a>, or <a href="https://github.com/google-gemini/gemini-cli">Gemini CLI</a>).</p>

[Start the Quickstart :material-arrow-right:](quickstart.md){.cta-primary}

</div>
